meaning: n.蛙或鸦的叫声vi.嗄嗄叫,发牢骚vt.用嘶哑的声音说
examples: He managed to croak a greeting.
His voice was just a croak.
I had a sore throat and could only croak.
Just the fact that your hard drive doesn't croak every hour is a miracle.
And does waiting for your owner to croak really constitute a viable business plan?
